title: argyranthemum escarrei
intro: Argyranthemum escarrei, also known as daisy eupatorium, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the Canary Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Argyranthemum escarrei include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Argyranthemum escarrei is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although it can also be used in tincture or essential oil form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
